daby_huang.name: Daby Huang
daby_huang.summary:
Daby Huang broke through with a tournament title — a moment that separates contenders from champions. Across 65 entries in 30 tournaments, Daby has shown the kind of competitive fire that produces breakthroughs, and there are surely more titles ahead.

A true triple-threat, Daby competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a doubles best of #3, 1 mixed doubles title. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Daby has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 32 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Allison Hsu — a trusted GD partner (10 events, best result: #5)
  • Krish Ashok — 5 events, 1 title together in XD

Having moved up to U19, Daby is navigating the challenge of tougher competition at the higher age group. The adjustment period is natural — and with the pedigree Daby brings, a return to the top is a matter of when, not if.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Daby has competed across U13, U15, U17 and U19, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Daby has competed across 6 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 1 title to show for it, Daby is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

diyaa_sarath.name: Diyaa Sarath
diyaa_sarath.summary:
Diyaa Sarath is a rising force in junior badminton, already collecting 2 tournament titles among 40 career entries across 15 tournaments. The trajectory is unmistakable — this is a player whose best chapters are still being written.

A true triple-threat, Diyaa competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 1 singles title, 1 doubles title, a mixed doubles best of #2. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Diyaa has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 14 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Eshan Neog — a trusted U15/XD partner (4 events)
  • Aditi Gummadi — 3 events in GD, best: #4

A veteran of the junior circuit, Diyaa has competed across U13, U15 and U17, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Diyaa has competed across 4 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, NorCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience and 2 titles to show for it, Diyaa is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.
